scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w app
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w app
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w app
scripts.validate: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.dev:sim: npm run build:shared && npx concurrently -n shared,backend,app -c blue,green,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run ios:sim -w app"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:shared && npx concurrently -n shared,backend,app -c blue,green,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run start -w app"
